name: typedef-description
description: typedef body kept VERBATIM: a trailing ` - ` is no longer peeled into doc — the whole-declaration descriptor is a separate `// T: #` line, and ` - ` denotes a per-property description handled downstream.
source: // T: typedef User = { id: string, name: string } - A registered user

expected.name: User
expected.ety: { id: string, name: string } - A registered user
